title: Never Be Enough
prompt: Translate the following lyrics into your local language and practice reading them aloud.
hint: Focus on capturing the emotion and meaning of the lyrics in your translation.
sample: I'm trying to hold my breath, let it stay this way.

zh.prompt: 將以下歌詞翻譯成你的母語並練習朗讀。
zh.hint: 著重於捕捉歌詞的情感和意義。
zh.sample: 我試著屏住呼吸，讓這一刻停留。

title: Never Be Enough
prompt: Practice reading the following lyrics aloud with emotion.
hint: Pay attention to the rhythm and feeling of the words.
sample: Can't let this moment end, you set off for dreaming me.

zh.prompt: 帶著情感練習朗讀以下歌詞。
zh.hint: 注意詞語的節奏和感覺。
zh.sample: 不能讓這一刻結束，你啟程去夢想我。

en: {'prompt': 'Practice reading the following lyrics aloud with emotion.', 'hint': 'Pay attention to the rhythm and feeling of the words.', 'sample': "Can't let this moment end, you set off for dreaming me."}

title: Never Be Enough
prompt: Describe the feelings expressed in the following lyrics.
hint: Think about the emotions behind the words and how they relate to longing and desire.
sample: All the shine of a thousand spotlights, all the stars we steal from the night sky will never be enough.
ja: {'prompt': 'Describe the feelings expressed in the following lyrics.', 'hint': 'Think about the emotions behind the words and how they relate to longing and desire.', 'sample': 'All the shine of a thousand spotlights, all the stars we steal from the night sky will never be enough.'}

zh.prompt: 描述以下歌詞中表達的情感。
zh.hint: 思考詞語背後的情感，以及它們如何與渴望和慾望相關。
zh.sample: 千盞聚光燈的光芒，夜空中我們偷走的星星，永遠不會足夠。
